mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warehouse(code, name, location, capacity, description) VALUES(#{code}, #{name}, #{location}, #{capacity}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE warehouse SET is_deleted=1 WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM warehouse WHERE id=#{id} AND is_deleted=0
SELECT * FROM warehouse WHERE code=#{code} AND is_deleted=0
SELECT * FROM warehouse WHERE is_deleted=0 ORDER BY code
